DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT BULLIUNG, GREGORY JOHN BULLIUNG & ASSOCIATES

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS GREGORY BULLIUNG, BULLIUNG & ASSOCIATES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO STATE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO CONSTITUTE A CLAIM FOR QUANTUM MERUIT AGAINST DEFENDANTS. THERE ARE NO ALLEGATIONS OF ANY AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND, IF IT CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE A CLAIM WITHIN THE PARAMETERS OF WEISS V. MARCUS (1975) 51 CAL. APP. 32D 590. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA; NOT REPORTED

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS GREGORY BULLIUNG AND BULLIUNG & ASSOCIATES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD A CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST THESE DEFENDANTS. WHETHER THE ACTION IS SUBJECT TO ARBITRATION IS A FACTUAL ISSUE IMPROPERLY RAISED ON DEMURRER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: DIANA CHEN, CSR # 11312 = (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS GREGORY BULLIUNG and BULLIUNG & ASSOCIATES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff is given leave to amend to plead a cause of action against these Defendants. Whether the action is subject to arbitration is a factual issue improperly raised on demurrer. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR # 11312 = (302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Jan-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Continued To Nov-28-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: S. PATRICK MILLER, ESQ., STUHR & MILLER, 415.585.2122, FOR DEFENDANTS GREGORY BULLIUNG, BULLIUNG & ASSOCIATES; NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS GREGORY BULLIUNG, BULLIUNG & ASSOCIATES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Sustained with twenty days leave to amend. The Complaint fails to state facts sufficient to constitute a claim for quantum meruit against Defendants. There are no allegations of any agreement between Plaintiff and Defendants. Plaintiff is given leave to amend, if it can do so in good faith, to allege a claim within the parameters of Weiss v. Marcus (1975) 51 Cal. App. 32d 590. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Not reported

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Continued To Aug-29-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS GREGORY BULLIUNG and BULLIUNG & ASSOCIATES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued on court's own motion to August 29, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. Opposing party is ordered to provide courtesy copies of their papers to Department 302 no later than 4:00pm on August 22, 2012. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
